scripts.build: pnpm --filter shared build && pnpm --filter infra build && pnpm --filter client build
scripts.deploy:frontend: pnpm --filter client build && pnpm --filter infra cdk deploy FrontendStack
scripts.test: pnpm --filter server test && pnpm --filter client test
scripts.dev:cli: pnpm --filter infra synth && sam local start-api --config-file packages/infra/samconfig.toml
